1057.issue: [E1057] js-controller 4.0.24 listed as dependency but 6.0.11 is required as minimum. Please update dependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/patrickbs96/ioBroker.twinkly/blob/master/io-package.json).

1090.issue: [E1090] admin dependency missing. admin 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please add to globalDependencies at [io-package.json](https://github.com/patrickbs96/ioBroker.twinkly/blob/master/io-package.json).

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.0.14 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3014.issue: [S3014] "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3018.issue: [S3018] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is missing required permissions "contents: write" and "id-token: write" at job level. Trusted publishing will not work without them.

3019.issue: [W3019] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

3021.issue: [S3021] "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 22. Consider updating to the recommended version 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 22 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3024.issue: [W3024] "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" matrix uses node.js 18 which is not in the list of recommended testing versions (20, 22, 24).

3025.issue: [E3025] "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" matrix is missing required node.js version 24. Tests with node.js 24 are required.

3032.issue: [W3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v1.0.14" was found for current release 1.0.14. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

3052.issue: [W3052] "test-and-release.yml": could not retrieve log for job "adapter-tests (22.x, windows-latest)" in [run #1889](https://github.com/patrickbs96/ioBroker.twinkly/actions/runs/23391546563).

4038.issue: [S4038] .vscode/settings.json file missing "json.schemas" property. Add schema definitions for better IntelliSense support.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5022.issue: [S5022] Please consider migrating to admin 5 UI (jsonConfig) or react based UI.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "os" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:os" instead.

5049.issue: [E5049] process.env is used in source files (lib/ping.js). process.env is incompatible with compact mode. Please use adapter configuration instead.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/patrickbs96/ioBroker.twinkly/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#539] "[iobroker-bot] Add Dependabot Ignore Rule for @types/node Major Version Updates"](https://github.com/patrickbs96/ioBroker.twinkly/issues/539)

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("github-actions", "npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

9010.issue: [E9010] file CHANGELOG_OLD.md found in repository, but not found in .npmignore

9506.issue: [E9506] i18n directory "admin/i18n" is excluded by .npmignore. Translations will be missing from the npm package.
